description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 3/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify `Jidoka.chat/3` works for module, pid, id, and session targets.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Implemented module targets for Jidoka.chat/3 by starting or reusing the generated runtime under the public agent id. Added provider-free coverage for module, pid, id, and session targets. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E2: Verify Jidoka.chat/3 works for module, pid, id, and session targets
